message:
feat(runtime): Add cancel_attribution_config accessor and setter on RuntimeState

Exposes the CancelAttributionConfig on RuntimeState via a getter/setter
pair, allowing callers (lab runtime, test harnesses, configuration paths)
to inspect and modify cancel attribution behavior without reaching into
internal fields directly.

- cancel_attribution_config(&self) -> CancelAttributionConfig (#[must_use])
- set_cancel_attribution_config(&mut self, config)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
